Class sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.Props 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----java.util.Dictionary
           |
           +----java.util.Hashtable
                   |
                   +----sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.Props
public class Props
extends Hashtable
This is a simpler version of java.util.Properties because of bugs in some versions that do not save or read unicode character strings properly.

Props()

load(InputStream)
save(OutputStream)

Props 
  public Props()

load 
  public void load(InputStream in) throws IOException
save 
  public void save(OutputStream out) throws IOException
